primary_sources.title: Letters Patent of Appointment of Prime Minister, 31 October 2003
SPR Official Results, GE11 (2004) — BN landslide; GE12 (2008) — BN loses two-thirds

notes: 5th PM. Succeeded Mahathir October 2003. Led BN to historic GE11 landslide (2004): 198 of 219 federal seats. Presided over GE12 (March 2008) where BN lost two-thirds majority for first time since 1969 (T4A event 01KS4DG6DR90NYV63DGW7H3B7A). Pressured to resign by intra-UMNO faction including Najib; transferred power April 2009. The 2008-2009 transition is the P5-to-P6 hinge event.
